access.description: Defines access controls for the resource, specifying roles and permissions for users, groups, or domains, along with optional conditions and targeted datasets, routines, or views.
access.type: list(object({domain: optional(string),group_by_email: optional(string),iam_member: optional(string),role: optional(string),special_group: optional(string),user_by_email: optional(string),condition: list(object({description: optional(string),expression: string,location: optional(string),title: optional(string)})),dataset: list(object({target_types: list(string),dataset: list(object({dataset_id: string,project_id: string}))})),routine: list(object({dataset_id: string,project_id: string,routine_id: string})),view: list(object({dataset_id: string,project_id: string,table_id: string}))}))

dataset_id.description: Unique identifier for the dataset. This is required and must be a valid string.

default_collation.description: Specifies the collation setting for tables in the dataset, if supported by the dataset's location.

default_encryption_configuration.description: Defines the default encryption key for tables created in the dataset, using a Cloud KMS key.

default_partition_expiration_ms.description: Sets the default partition expiration time in milliseconds for tables created in the dataset. Must be non-negative if specified.

default_table_expiration_ms.description: Defines the default expiration time in milliseconds for tables created in the dataset. Must be non-negative if specified.

delete_contents_on_destroy.description: Indicates whether the contents of the dataset should be deleted when the resource is destroyed. Defaults to false.

description.description: Provides a detailed description of the dataset. Optional and can be used for documentation purposes.

external_dataset_reference.description: Specifies the connection and external source details for linking to an external dataset.

friendly_name.description: Defines a user-friendly name for the dataset, which can be displayed in interfaces. Optional.

is_case_insensitive.description: Specifies whether the dataset allows case-insensitive table and column names. Optional.

labels.description: Key-value pairs used for tagging the dataset to organize or filter resources. Optional.

location.description: Specifies the geographic location where the dataset is stored, such as 'US' or 'EU'.

max_time_travel_hours.description: Defines the maximum time travel duration in hours for querying historical data in the dataset.

resource_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the dataset for resource organization. Optional.

storage_billing_model.description: Specifies the billing model for storage usage in the dataset, such as 'logical' or 'physical'.

timeouts.description: Configures timeouts for resource operations, including create, delete, and update actions.
